query: scratched dusty damaged old film negative photo
message: sub:film_artifacts/scratch_decay — anti_aesthetic — scratches, dust spots, chemical stains, tintype/wet-plate degradation

response.objective_caption: An abstract image dominated by deep green, teal, and gold tones with radiating fine linear textures, a bright central white area, and scattered small particles across a dark ground.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An abstract photograph rich with film artifacts and heavy grain, showing a degraded dark surface with golden linear abrasions and green tonal shifts, where a bright central hotspot emerges from a field of particulate texture and organic imperfection, evoking entropy and material decay.
